overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character walking through a wet New York City street at night. The scene features urban architecture with autumn foliage, street lighting, and light pedestrian and vehicle traffic on damp pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with commercial storefronts and waste containers

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, passing pedestrians and approaching large street dumpsters

notable_agents.action: woman in business attire walking past Spider-Man in the opposite direction

entered.detail: Building entrance with glass doors and overhead canopy lighting
Yellow and blue dumpster with hot dog advertisement text
Deciduous tree with orange and yellow autumn foliage

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a wet city sidewalk at night, passing by a covered building entrance and metal trash cans. The street is lined with tall buildings and illuminated by street lamps, with large green and yellow dumpsters visible ahead on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection crosswalk with traffic control

events.description: Spider-Man steps from concrete sidewalk onto asphalt crosswalk to cross the intersection
Spider-Man crosses the intersection while vehicles wait at the red traffic light

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking across the zebra-striped crosswalk through the intersection

entered.detail: White painted zebra crossing lines on wet asphalt
Overhead traffic signal showing red light
Stone facade building on corner with illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man enters a wide street intersection, crossing the white-striped crosswalk. The historic corner building rises ahead while traffic waits at the red light. The autumn tree shifts to the right as the camera moves through the open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with postal boxes and parked vehicles

events.description: Spider-Man steps back onto the sidewalk from the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking along the sidewalk, passing a blue postal mailbox and parked yellow taxis

notable_agents.action: man in suit standing near building entrance looking at phone

entered.detail: Building entrance with green painted facade and concrete steps

segments.scene_description: Back on the sidewalk, Spider-Man passes a blue postal mailbox and a green storefront. The historic building recedes to the left while the autumn tree moves closer to the center. Pedestrians walk along the path as street lamps illuminate the wet pavement.

events.description: Spider-Man enters the crosswalk to cross the wide avenue
Spider-Man weaves between stopped vehicles waiting at the traffic light

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crossing the busy intersection, navigating between waiting cars and groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: silver sedan stopped at red light waiting for pedestrians

entered.detail: White striped pedestrian crossing on asphalt

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man crosses another wide intersection, moving between vehicles stopped at the red light. The historic corner building dominates the far side of the street while pedestrians gather at the corners. The autumn tree stands prominently on the right as the crosswalk stripes pass beneath.

events.description: Spider-Man completes crossing and returns to the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man continuing down the sidewalk past pedestrians and street trees

entered.detail: Building facade with red brick and graffiti markings

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along the final stretch of sidewalk, passing a red brick building with graffiti. The crosswalk and intersection fall behind as the character continues down the illuminated city street, with parked taxis visible in the distance and autumn trees lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked New York City street at night, transitioning from a narrow sidewalk into a series of wide, bustling intersections. It begins with Spider-Man walking past covered building entrances and metal trash cans, moving toward large dumpsters under the glow of street lamps. As he enters a wide intersection, the camera glides across a white-striped crosswalk toward a towering historic corner building while autumn trees shift into view. The scene then moves back onto the sidewalk past a blue postal mailbox and green storefronts before crossing another intersection between vehicles stopped at a red light. Finally, the camera follows the character past a graffiti-covered red brick building as the intersections recede, leaving the path lined with autumn trees and distant parked taxis.
